summary: CBP (Detroit Field Office) video about the CBP Home app and a $2,600 exit bonus, with no audio track. It opens on a phone screen of the app ('Home / Getting You Home Quickly And Easily / Receive an exit bonus') overlaid with glowing purple caption text ('WHEN YOU DECIDE TO SELF-DEPORT THE EASY WAY...'), then cuts to dark blue-lit footage of a man with neon money text moving across the screen ('...AND GET PAID $2,600!').

script.scene: Phone screenshot of the CBP Home app 'Home' screen ('Getting You Home Quickly And Easily', 'Receive an exit bonus', blue 'Continue' button). Glowing purple and magenta caption overlaid at top: 'WHEN YOU DECIDE TO SELF-DEPORT THE EASY WAY...' with a cartoon of an adult swinging a child. CBP / Detroit Field Office seal at bottom.
The same app screen held, caption still on screen.
Cut to dark blue-lit footage of a man in an indoor scene; neon caption begins to appear.
Neon dollar-amount text zooms across the frame in stacked red, yellow and pink layers: 'AND GET PAID $2,600!' over the blue footage.
Glowing purple text with a black outline, '...AND GET PAID $2,600!', settles over the blue-lit man; CBP Field Operations seal in the corner.

notable_text: WHEN YOU DECIDE TO SELF-DEPORT THE EASY WAY... ...AND GET PAID $2,600! / Home - Getting You Home Quickly And Easily - Receive an exit bonus / CBP Detroit Field Office / tweet: 'Use the CBP Home App to self-depart and you could receive a $2,600 exit bonus-up from $1,000! ... leave with cash and a smile!'
